data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the decision lifecycle.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the decision lifecycle (allow/challenge/restrict/revoke), but there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of an API or mechanism that implements this lifecycle. The prior steps do not address this requirement, indicating a gap in coverage. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive as there is no concrete evidence to support or refute the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of decision lifecycle functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the decision lifecycle requirement.
